title: prunus persica subsp. domestica
intro: Prunus persica subsp. domestica, commonly known as the domesticated peach tree, is a deciduous tree native to China, cultivated for its delicious and nutritious fruit. The medicinal properties of the peach tree include its high antioxidant content, anti-inflammatory properties, and potential anti-cancer effects, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine. The health benefits of consuming peach fruit include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health, as well as providing essential vitamins and minerals. The herbal preparations of Prunus persica subsp. domestica include peach kernel oil, peach leaf tea, and dried peach fruit, which can be used to support immune function, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being.
